phases.name: Create CLAUDE.md
phases.description: Create CLAUDE.md in project root with: project overview, Go service architecture, Docker deployment details, testing commands ('go test ./...'), build commands ('go build ./...'), and key development workflows. This provides critical context for future AI-assisted development sessions.

phases.name: Add Integration Tests
phases.description: Add integration test suite in tests/integration/ covering end-to-end API workflows. Test actual HTTP requests to running service, database interactions, and Docker container communication. Create tests/integration/api_test.go with table-driven tests for main endpoints. Run with 'go test ./tests/integration/ -v'.

phases.name: Security Hardening
phases.description: Add input validation middleware in internal/middleware/validation.go. Implement rate limiting, request size limits, and sanitization for all user inputs. Add gosec security scanner to CI: run 'go install github.com/securecodewarrior/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@latest' then 'gosec ./...'. Fix any high-severity findings.
success_criteria: gosec runs with no high-severity issues

rationale: Project is healthy with passing builds and tests. Priorities: (1) CLAUDE.md enables better AI assistance going forward; (2) Integration tests catch real-world issues unit tests miss; (3) Security hardening protects the deployed service. No critical fixes needed.
